name: Flavored Butters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the chopped parsley, sweet butter, and lemon juice until well combined.
2. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before using.
This is delicious on broiled steak or fish.
3. To make Dill Butter:
- Cream together 1/2 pound soft sweet butter, 1 tablespoon minced fresh dill, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, and a dash of Tabasco sauce.
- Serve the mixture at room temperature.
